news.headline: Globalstar shares growth strategy and financial outlook at Investor Day on Dec 12, 2024. Next-gen telco provider.
news.summary: Globalstar, Inc. (NYSE American: GSAT), a telecommunications infrastructure and technology provider, conducted an investor day on December 12, 2024. The event aimed to highlight strategic priorities for maximizing value from core assets. The executive team presented updates on short and long-term financial plans. Key points discussed included the vision for the future and enhancing shareholder value. Globalstar emphasized its commitment to growth and innovation during the event.

news.headline: Quarterly cash dividend of $0.75 per share declared by Onfolio Holdings Inc.
news.summary: The recent data reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, a decrease of 1.1% from the previous quarter. This marks a significant improvement with a total of 500,000 more people employed. Additionally, the GDP growth rate for the same period has surged to 6.5%, exceeding initial forecasts. The government attributes this economic expansion to increased consumer spending and a boost in manufacturing output. Moreover, the stock market has seen a record high with the main index reaching 35,000 points. Experts predict that this positive trend is likely to continue in the upcoming months.

news.headline: Samfine Creation Holdings Group Limited (Nasdaq: SFHG) announces H1 2024 unaudited financial results in Hong Kong.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, a printing service provider based in Hong Kong, SAMFINE CREATION HOLDINGS GROUP LIMITED (Nasdaq: SFHG), revealed its unaudited financial results for the period of six months concluding on June 30, 2024.

news.headline: Credit Acceptance completed a $300.0 million asset-backed financing in Michigan, with loans totaling $375.1 million conveyed.
news.summary: Southfield, MI - December 20, 2024 - Credit Acceptance Corporation (Nasdaq: CACC) disclosed the finalization of a $300 million asset-backed non-recourse secured financing today. Under this agreement, loans worth around $375.1 million were transferred to a wholly owned special purpose entity. These loans will be pledged to institutional lenders via a loan and security agreement. Additionally, the company will issue three classes of notes as a part of this transaction.

news.headline: Biden scraps student debt proposals for 38M borrowers, acknowledging Trump admin's lack of support.
news.summary: The choice to retract the regulations implied an acknowledgment that they wouldn't progress under the Trump administration.

news.headline: JD Martin receives representation of Dialight in NC and SC starting from Dec 1, 2024; marks expansion in market.
news.summary: On December 1st, 2024, JD Martin secured a new territory in North and South Carolina. The announcement was made in Charlotte, N.C., on December 20th, 2024. This marks a significant milestone in JD Martin's partnership with Dialight, a prominent company specializing in industrial LED lighting technology.

news.headline: SigmaTron International, Inc. reported financial results for Q2 FY2025, ending Oct 31, 2024, with revenues and earnings disclosed.
news.summary: In Elk Grove Village, Illinois, on December 20, 2024, SigmaTron International, Inc. (NASDAQ: SGMA), a leading electronic manufacturing services company, disclosed its financial performance for the fiscal quarter concluding on October 31, 2024.

news.headline: Armlogi Holding Corp. secures $5 million in pre-paid advance under agreement with YA II PN, Ltd., enhancing its logistics services.
news.summary: In Walnut, California on December 20, 2024, Armlogi Holding Corp. disclosed the completion of a $5 million transaction. The company, listed as BTOC on Nasdaq, specializes in warehousing and logistics services in the U.S., providing a range of solutions for warehouse management and order fulfillment. This funding constitutes the second installment of a Pre-Paid Advance under a Standby Equity Purchase Agreement with YA II PN, Ltd., managed by Yorkville Advisors Global, LP.

news.headline: Giftify, Inc. sells $5.0 million worth of common stock in a registered direct offering with individual investors.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, in Schaumburg, IL, Giftify, Inc. (NASDAQ: GIFT), the company behind CardCash.com and Restaurant.com, popular digital platforms for incentives and rewards in retail, dining, and entertainment, disclosed a recent agreement. The Company has engaged in a securities purchase deal with specific individual investors to procure around $5.0 million shares of its common stock (or similar common stock equivalents) in an official direct offering.

news.headline: Bridgeline Digital (NASDAQ: BLIN) to report Q4 fiscal 2024 results on Dec 23 after market close.
news.summary: WOBURN, Massachusetts - On December 20, 2024 – Bridgeline Digital, Inc. (NASDAQ: BLIN), known for its pioneering AI-driven marketing solutions, disclosed plans to unveil its Q4 fiscal 2024 financial outcomes post-market closure on Monday, December 23, 2024. This global frontrunner in marketing tech aims to provide a comprehensive update on its performance as the quarter comes to a close.

news.headline: Ottawa Bancorp, Inc. finishes stock repurchase program, buying back 127,332 shares at $13.51/share.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Ottawa Bancorp, Inc. (OTCQX: OTTW), the parent company of OSB Community Bank, revealed the successful conclusion of its stock repurchase initiative. The program saw the acquisition of 127,332 shares of the company's common stock at an average cost of $13.51 per share.

news.headline: Coinbase and BiT Global dispute over $1B in wBTC, with updates on Deutsche Bank, USDT in Europe, FTX creditors, and BVNK's move to US.
news.summary: In this week's edition of Crypto Biz, we delve into the contentious removal of wBTC from Coinbase, Deutsche Bank's foray into blockchain technology, the increasing use of USDT in Europe, the repayment of creditors by FTX, and BVNK's relocation to the United States. These developments reflect the changing landscape of cryptocurrency, with Coinbase facing scrutiny over its delisting decision, Deutsche Bank embracing blockchain innovation, USDT gaining traction in the European market, FTX meeting creditor obligations, and BVNK expanding its presence to the US market. These highlights underscore the dynamic nature of the crypto industry.

news.headline: GOP Rep. Huizenga anticipates 'Trump Trifecta' in January after funding bill.
news.summary: Following the passing of a funding bill, GOP Representative Huizenga expressed anticipation for a 'Trump Trifecta' in January. The bill resulted in significant government funding of approximately $1.4 trillion, with a focus on national security measures and allocating $1.5 billion for border security. Representative Huizenga pointed out that the upcoming January would bring about enhanced collaboration between the administration and Congress, with expectations of significant progress under Trump's leadership.

news.headline: PlayersTV merges with Cloud Media Center, adds Sports-AI Ad Tech for over 1B monthly impressions. Owned by 2,200 fans and 70+ star athletes like Chris Paul and Dwayne Wade.
news.summary: A new sports network, the first to be collectively owned by both athletes and fans, has garnered support from 2,200 Fan Owners and over 70 superstar athletes. Notable investors and partners include Chris Paul, Travis Kelce, Dwayne Wade, Chiney Ogwumike, Kyrie Irving, Damian Lillard, Natasha Cloud, Alysha Clark, Carmelo Anthony, and numerous others in Los Angeles.

Employees in LA, Chicago, Seattle strike after failed talks on raises with the company.
news.summary: Thousands of workers in Los Angeles, Chicago, and Seattle have initiated walkouts following unsuccessful discussions between the company and the workers’ union regarding salary increases.

news.headline: The Cordish Companies set Feb 13, 2025, as grand opening for $270M+ Live! Casino & Hotel Louisiana, with an inaugural entertainment lineup. Tickets on sale, luxury hotel accepting online reservations. Visit Louisiana.LiveCasinoHotel.com.

The lineup includes performances by Walker Hayes, The Commodores, Matt Mathews, and Clint Black. Make reservations for the luxurious Live! Hotel by visiting Louisiana.LiveCasinoHotel.com. Tickets can be purchased online at the same website. Be part of this exciting event in Bossier, Louisiana.

news.headline: Explore the growth of self-directed AI on Bloomberg.

Cryptocurrency markets recover despite volatility. Bitcoin at $97,108.38 (+0.3%), Ethereum at $3,462.57 (+2.6%), XRP at $2.27 (+2.5%). Large transactions up 4.6%. Exchanges netflows down 312.3%. 327,657 traders liquidated in past 24 hours for $963.51 million. Kim Jong Un-linked hackers steal $1.3B in cryptocurrencies.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency markets experienced a day of fluctuating activity despite increasing interest in spot ETFs. The prices and gains/losses for various cryptocurrencies were as follows: Bitcoin at $97,108.38 (+0.3%), Ethereum at $3,462.57 (+2.6%), Solana at $190.13 (-1.3%), XRP at $2.27 (+2.5%), Dogecoin at $0.3152 (+0.9%), and Shiba Inu at $0.00002172 (+0.5%). Noteworthy figures include a 4.6% rise in large transaction volume, a 0.3% decrease in daily active addresses, and a jump in transactions over $100,000 from 13,516 to 13,885 in a day. Exchanges netflows saw a 312.3% decrease. In the last 24 hours, Coinglass data recorded the liquidation of 327,657 traders, resulting in losses amounting to $963.51 million. A significant event was the report of Kim Jong Un’s North Korea-Linked Hackers allegedly stealing $1.3 billion in Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies in 2024. Streams of the full story are accessible on various platforms.

news.headline: Lilly strengthens weight loss lead despite setback from Novo; Details in Bloomberg.
Renovaro is now compliant with NASDAQ's listing requirement.
CFTC Positions in the Week Ended December 17th
LiveOne (NASDAQ: LVO) compliant with Nasdaq's minimum bid price rule. Shares trade under symbol "LVO".
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, LiveOne (Nasdaq: LVO), a renowned music, entertainment, and technology platform, disclosed that it has satisfied Nasdaq's minimum bid price stipulation as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2). The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC ("Nasdaq") officially notified LiveOne about regaining compliance, indicating the closure of this issue. Consequently, LiveOne's common stock will persist in trading on Nasdaq under the symbol "LVO".

news.headline: Instagram will introduce an AI video editor allowing users to manipulate videos by typing text commands. Adam Mosseri unveiled the tech.
news.summary: Adam Mosseri, the head of Instagram, recently unveiled the latest AI capabilities that allow users to modify videos by using text to alter visual content. This cutting-edge feature aims to simplify the video editing process for Instagram users, making it easier to customize their content. The announcement has sparked excitement among the platform's users, with many looking forward to trying out the innovative tool. The new AI features are set to revolutionize video editing on Instagram and enhance the overall user experience. The update is expected to roll out to all users in the coming weeks and has the potential to significantly impact how videos are created and shared on the platform. It is a significant advancement in Instagram's functionality and reflects the platform's commitment to innovation in social media technology.

news.headline: Cindy Fratarcangeli promoted to Partner at Ormsby Park LLC after 25 years in executive search.
news.summary: The announcement was made in San Francisco on December 20, 2024, that Cindy Fratarcangeli has been promoted to Partner at Ormsby Park. With over 25 years of experience in executive search, Cindy will be bringing her expertise to recruiting top financial leadership positions for Fortune 1000 companies and private enterprises.

news.summary: The recently launched artificial intelligence platform, OpenAI o3, has exhibited superior performance in comparison to other prominent A.I. technologies. It has excelled in assessments evaluating proficiency in math, science, coding, and logic-based tasks.

news.headline: Mitel set for 2025 growth with hybrid solutions & AI partnerships; 70M+ users, Unify acquisition, milestone celebrations.

After acquiring Unify, Mitel boasts a customer base exceeding 70 million users worldwide. The past year has seen the company achieve notable milestones, such as launching a unified portfolio strategy.

news.headline: AstroTurf appoints Tom Carroll as Regional Sales Manager for Tri State area (Eastern PA, NJ, DE). Dec 20, 2024.
news.summary: In Dalton, Georgia on December 20, 2024, AstroTurf®, a top supplier of high-quality synthetic turf solutions, has appointed Tom Carroll as the Regional Sales Manager covering the Tri State area of Eastern Pennsylvania, New Jersey, and Delaware. Tom, with extensive experience in the industry, will be overseeing sales in this region.

news.headline: Monday FX Options Expiries

Illinois Commerce Commission greenlights ComEd's updated grid plan focusing on reliability, renewable energy growth, and economic development uptick. ICC's requested changes included, and the plan puts Illinois on the path to full decarbonization.
news.summary: In Chicago, the Illinois Commerce Commission (ICC) recently gave the green light to ComEd's amended grid plan from March 2024, following ICC's requests for revisions in December 2023. The plan emphasizes enhancing system reliability to bolster the expansion of renewable energy and sustained economic progress in alignment with the targets set by the Illinois Climate and Equitable Jobs Act (CEJA). This move aims to aid in Illinois' transition to fully decarbonized operations.

news.headline: Bitcoin correction near end, realized losses surpass weekly average, hinting at market bottom amid current sell-off.
news.summary: Traders dealing in Bitcoin have probably reached the highest point of their realized losses, indicating a possible end to the current sell-off of BTC. This signifies a potential turning point in the market scenario, with traders possibly experiencing a decrease in losses incurred from their Bitcoin trades.

news.headline: BGL announces sale of Indo~European Foods to Ziyad Brothers, premier distributor of ethnic foods.
news.summary: Leading distributor of ethnic and specialty food products, Indo~European Foods (IEF), has been acquired by Brown Gibbons Lang & Company (BGL) in a recent sale. The event took place in Chicago on December 20, 2024. IEF is recognized for its diverse range of value-added ethnic and specialty food products. This strategic acquisition positions BGL for long-term growth in this market segment. The deal signifies a significant advancement for both companies.

news.headline: iAnyGo Android App V3.0.0 allows for GPS spoofing on Pokémon GO and Monster Hunter without a PC, released on Dec. 20, 2024.
news.summary: Manipulate your Android location effortlessly with the iAnyGo Fake GPS App now available without the need for a computer. The latest update, version 3.0.0 of the iAnyGo Android App, brings a range of new features. This tool allows users to fake their GPS location on Android devices, providing an easy way to change their virtual location without the necessity of a PC. The release, as of December 20, 2024, comes with capabilities that enable users to spoof their location seamlessly through the app. This convenience is emphasized by the absence of the requirement for a computer, making the process more user-friendly. The update is now accessible to users, offering enhanced flexibility and functionality.

news.headline: OpenAI introduces OpenAI o3, an advanced A.I. system excelling in math, science, coding, and logic tests.
news.summary: According to reports, a cutting-edge artificial intelligence startup has revealed their latest system, OpenAI o3, which has demonstrated superior performance compared to other prominent A.I. technologies. The new system excelled in assessments measuring abilities in mathematics, science, coding, and logic, surpassing the capabilities of its competitors.

news.headline: Luigi Mangione, accused of murdering UnitedHealth Group CEO Brian Thompson, now in jail with Diddy & FTX founder.
news.summary: Luigi Mangione, the individual accused in the homicide case of UnitedHealth Group CEO Brian Thompson, is currently being held at a detention center alongside other inmates of similar notoriety.

news.headline: Dow surges 600+ points, gold up 1.5%. Dow at 43,000.53, NASDAQ at 19,693.06, S&P 500 at 5,956.61. Oil rigs up to 483.
news.summary: Stocks in the U.S. saw an uptick in trading, with the Dow Jones index surging over 600 points on Friday. The Dow climbed 1.55% to reach 43,000.53, while the NASDAQ and S&P 500 also experienced gains, rising by 1.65% to 19,693.06 and 1.53% to 5,956.61, respectively. Real estate sector shares jumped by 2.4%, while consumer staples increased by 0.4%. The total count of active U.S. oil rigs increased by 1 to 483 rigs this week. Humacyte, Inc. (NASDAQ:HUMA) shares spiked 40% to $4.8500 following FDA approval for SYMVESS to treat vascular injuries, with HC Wainwright & Co. raising its price target on the stock from $12 to $15. Personalis, Inc. (NASDAQ:PSNL) shares surged 25% to $6.55 due to collaboration news with Moderna.

news.headline: DvSum partners with Guidewire's Insurtech Vanguards program to improve data management for insurers. 104 characters
news.summary: DvSum, a prominent data intelligence solutions provider based in Sunnyvale, California, has recently been selected to join Guidewire’s Insurtech Vanguards program. Guidewire, a leading property and casualty (P&C) cloud platform provider listed on the New York Stock Exchange as GWRE, spearheads this initiative to link insurers with cutting-edge insurtech solutions aimed at enhancing operational productivity and fostering a customer-centric approach. Aashish Singhvi, the C-something of DvSum, expressed enthusiasm about joining the Insurtech Vanguards community at Guidewire.

news.headline: House will vote Friday on plan to avert shutdown, says Johnson.
NBT Bancorp Inc. gets regulatory nod for merger with Evans Bancorp; Comptroller of the Currency and Federal Reserve involved.
news.summary: NBT Bancorp Inc. ("NBT"), listed on NASDAQ as NBTB, has recently been granted regulatory approval to finalize the proposed merger of Evans Bancorp, Inc. ("Evans"), traded on NYSE American as EVBN. The merger involves Evans being merged with NBT and Evans Bank, N.A. with NBT Bank, N.A. The Office of the Comptroller of the Currency has given the green light for the merger of Evans Bank with NBT Bank, and NBT has obtained a waiver from the Federal Reserve Bank of New York regarding any application related to the merger of Evans with NBT.

news.headline: Hyatt Centric South Beach Miami reopens after renovations at 1600 Collins Ave, Miami Beach, FL, elevating luxury and style.
news.summary: In a recent update, the Hyatt Centric South Beach Miami revealed the successful conclusion of its awaited renovations, setting new standards of opulence and elegance in the vibrant South Beach area at 1600 Collins Ave, Miami Beach, FL 33139. The refurbishment, helmed by Lang & Schwander, has transformed the property into a premium destination.

news.headline: 20+ states and cities mark December 2024 as Osteopathic Medicine Month, honoring 200,000 DOs and students.
news.summary: In December 2024, around 200,000 osteopathic physicians (DOs) and medical students in the U.S. are being honored as more than 20 states and cities nationwide celebrate Osteopathic Medicine Month. This acknowledgment coincides with the 150th anniversary of osteopathic medicine.

news.headline: Feinberg & Waller, APC showcases legal excellence at 2024 AAML meeting in Chicago. Firm honored at leading family law event.
news.summary: In an event held in Chicago at the 2024 American Academy of Matrimonial Lawyers (AAML) annual meeting, Feinberg & Waller, APC showcased its commitment to legal excellence and innovative practices in family law. The firm, an esteemed leader in the field, impressed attendees with their expertise. This demonstration of dedication took place on December 20, 2024, without specifying the source.

news.headline: Brent Crude futures settle at $72.94/bbl, up 6 cents, 0.08%
California American Water emphasizes safety for customers and employees, including monitoring scam incidents.
news.summary: In Pacific Grove, California, California American Water underscores the significance of safety for both customers and employees. The company prioritizes safety by consistently monitoring and implementing safety measures. This includes ensuring the delivery of safe, clean, and dependable water service, as well as prioritizing the well-being of their workers, customers, and the communities they serve. Concerns have arisen as California American Water discovered scammers pretending to be utility workers requesting entry into households. Stay vigilant and report any suspicious activity.

news.headline: Check out the latest in crypto today: updates on Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3, and regulation. Stay informed!
news.summary: Interested in staying updated on the latest in the world of cryptocurrency? Look no further for a recap of today's significant developments. Stay informed about the daily movements affecting the price of Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies, as well as the latest events influencing blockchain technology, decentralized finance (DeFi), non-fungible tokens (NFTs), Web3, and regulatory updates. Keep a close watch on the crypto space for valuable insights.

news.headline: Gray Capital predicts positive investment prospects and high housing demand in 2025 in their Multifamily Forecast report.
news.summary: A multifamily investment company based in Indianapolis, Gray Capital, has released a report titled "2025 Multifamily Forecast" outlining key trends in the housing market and economy that are expected to influence the apartment sector in the upcoming year. This report provides insights into the various factors likely to shape the market, with a focus on significant trends.

news.headline: Wall Street rallies as inflation data falls short: PCE index up 2.4%, core PCE up 2.8%. Markets rebound, travel stocks surge.
news.summary: Wall Street saw a resurgence in risk sentiment on Friday as November inflation data came in softer than expected, leading to a market rebound after the recent sell-off triggered by the Federal Reserve's meeting. The Personal Consumption Expenditure price index increased by 2.4% year-over-year, falling short of the forecasted 2.5%. The core PCE, a crucial metric monitored by the Fed, also missed expectations by rising 2.8% instead of the anticipated 2.9%.By midday Friday, all major indices were experiencing a robust rally, with broad-based gains seen across various sectors. In the S&P 500, 480 companies saw increases in their trading value, and every sector witnessed growth as investors welcomed the alleviation of inflationary pressures.The real estate sector led the market rebound, bouncing back strongly after taking a hit following the Fed meeting. Small-cap stocks in the Russell 2000 also saw significant gains, driven by a strong recovery in regional banks. Additionally, the travel industry soared, buoyed by positive earnings and optimistic guidance.

news.headline: Corvia Medical obtains CE certification for atrial shunt under EU MDR standards, aligns with RESPONDER-HF trial.
news.summary: A company focused on revolutionizing heart failure treatment, Corvia Medical, Inc., has successfully obtained CE certification for their Corvia® product in Europe. This milestone coincides with the ongoing RESPONDER-HF clinical trial. The certification was announced on Dec. 20, 2024 in Tewksbury, Massachusetts. The Corvia® device aims to address heart failure issues and marks a significant advancement in the field. This achievement showcases the company's commitment to enhancing cardiac healthcare.
